prompt_text: cloud infrastructure tools with native GitHub integration
response:
# Cloud Infrastructure Tools with Native GitHub Integration

## Top Tools

### **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**

| Tool | GitHub Integration | Best For |
|------|-------------------|----------|
| **Terraform Cloud** | Native VCS, PR automation, policy as code | Multi-cloud IaC |
| **AWS CloudFormation** | CodePipeline integration, SAM CLI | AWS-native |
| **Pulumi** | GitHub Actions, automated deployments | Programmatic IaC |
| **Bicep** | ARM templates, Azure DevOps + GitHub | Azure infrastructure |

### **CI/CD & Deployment**

| Tool | GitHub Integration | Strengths |
|------|-------------------|-----------|
| **GitHub Actions** | Native (built-in) | Workflows, matrix builds, self-hosted runners |
| **Flux** | GitOps, continuous reconciliation | Kubernetes deployments |
| **ArgoCD** | Git-driven deployments, sync policies | GitOps for K8s |
| **Vercel** | Auto-deploy on push, preview environments | Serverless/Next.js |
| **Netlify** | GitHub App, branch deploys | Static sites & functions |

### **Container & Kubernetes**

| Tool | GitHub Integration | Features |
|------|-------------------|----------|
| **GitHub Container Registry** | Native | Private image hosting |
| **Amazon ECR** | GitHub Actions, image scanning | AWS-native container registry |
| **Docker Hub** | Automated builds from repos | Public image builds |

### **Infrastructure Automation**

| Tool | GitHub Integration | Use Case |
|------|-------------------|----------|
| **CloudFormation** | AWS CodePipeline | AWS infrastructure |
| **Ansible** | Playbooks in repos, GitHub actions | Multi-cloud automation |
| **Terraform Enterprise** | VCS workflows, state management | Enterprise IaC |

## **Best Integration Examples**

### **1. GitHub Actions + Terraform Cloud**
```yaml
name: Terraform
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  terraform:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v2
      - run: terraform plan
        env:
          TF_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TF_API_TOKEN }}
```

### **2. GitHub Actions + AWS**
```yaml
- name: Deploy to AWS
  uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2
  with:
    aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
    aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
    aws-region: us-east-1
```

### **3. GitOps with ArgoCD**
```yaml
# ArgoCD watches GitHub repo for changes
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: my-app
spec:
  source:
    repoURL: https://github.com/org/repo
    path: apps/my-app
  destination:
    server: https://kubernetes.default.svc
```

## **Comparison Matrix**

| Feature | GitHub Actions | Terraform Cloud | ArgoCD | Pulumi |
|---------|---|---|---|---|
| Native GitHub Integration | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Multi-Cloud | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Learning Curve | Easy | Medium | Medium | Hard |
| Cost | Free tier | $20/user/mo | Free | Free/Enterprise |

## **Recommended Stack**

**For startups:**
- GitHub Actions + Terraform + GitHub Container Registry

**For enterprises:**
- Terraform Cloud/Enterprise + GitHub Actions + ArgoCD + ECR

**For Kubernetes:**
- GitHub Actions + ArgoCD/Flux + GitHub Container
